title: Visitor Information Center - San Francisco
content: ## Welcome to San Francisco! The Visitor Information Center at the Moscone Center is open during operating hours when conventions are taking place. The center offers a variety of amenities including helpful services, partner links, and directions to help you navigate the city. Explore the rich art and culture of San Francisco where unique neighborhoods and iconic landmarks await. Whether you're here for business or leisure, our center is your first stop to make the most of your visit. Image of the Moscone Visitor Center with a staff member behind the desk sharing information with attendees. ## Explore San Francisco Your Way! Onsite the interactive tourist itinerary-building kiosks in the visitor center allow travelers to customize their San Francisco experience with ease. **SF Visitor Information Center App:**. SF Visitor Center App (Apple Store). SF Visitor Center App (Google Play Store). QR codes linking to the app on Apple Store & Google Play Store. ## Welcome to The Moscone Center!

title: Experiences | San Francisco Marriott Marquis
content: ## San Francisco Marriott Marquis. # Stay near the action at our hotel near the Moscone Center. Our hotel near Civic Center, San Francisco's Moscone Convention Center and Yerba Buena Gardens, places guests in the heart of the action. Explore popular San Francisco attractions like Union Square, the Chase Center, Oracle Park, the iconic Cable Cars, world-class restaurants, shopping, museums, and more. Uncover COR, our extensive fitness and health center, specialized for maintaining your wellness during your San Francisco vacation. ### The Best of San Francisco. Their recommendations offer a unique perspective on the city’s best experiences and provide a starting point for your upcoming San Francisco vacation. The Insider Favorites at our hotel near Bill Graham Civic Auditorium, include a diverse range of options, from succulent prime rib to both casual and upscale dining experiences. The COR Health & Fitness Center at our hotel near Moscone Center, San Francisco, invites you to slip into a world of health and serenity for your body, mind, and spirit.
